task_completion.description: Navigate to the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the CAMEO Chemicals homepage or search pages (cameochemicals.noaa.gov).

task_completion.description: Record the correct PAC-2 value and source for Chlorine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final text file contains an entry for Chlorine with a PAC-2 value of 2.0 ppm and the source basis AEGL.

task_completion.description: Record the correct PAC-2 value and source for Cyclohexane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final text file contains an entry for Cyclohexane with a PAC-2 value of 1700 ppm and the source basis TEEL.

task_completion.description: Record the correct PAC-2 value and source for Sodium Hydroxide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final text file contains an entry for Sodium Hydroxide with a PAC-2 value of 5 mg/m3 (or mg/m³) and the source basis TEEL.

task_completion.description: Record the correct PAC-2 value and source for Methyl Mercaptan, avoiding the ERPG trap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final text file contains an entry for Methyl Mercaptan with a PAC-2 value of 23 ppm and the source basis AEGL (must NOT be 25 ppm or ERPG).

task_completion.description: Record the correct PAC-2 value and source for Acetone, avoiding the TEEL metadata trap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final text file contains an entry for Acetone with a PAC-2 value of 3200 ppm and the source basis AEGL (must NOT be TEEL).

task_completion.description: Save the audit report to the correct location on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window shows the file being saved exactly as '~/Desktop/pac_audit_results.txt' (or /home/user/Desktop/pac_audit_results.txt) containing the chemical data.

integrity.description: The agent actively used the CAMEO Chemicals web interface to search for the chemicals.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing chemical names into the CAMEO Chemicals search bar and viewing the chemical data pages, rather than just writing a script with hardcoded values.

integrity.description: The agent created a genuine text file rather than just printing output to the terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the use of a text editor (like nano, vim, gedit) or file redirection commands (like echo or cat >) targeting the pac_audit_results.txt file.

integrity.description: The agent did not blindly copy the expected sources from the prompt/metadata, specifically for Acetone.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent correctly identifies AEGL as the source for Acetone by reading the CAMEO page, rather than assuming TEEL.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified PAC-2 values and sources: 1) Chlorine: 2.0 ppm, AEGL. 2) Cyclohexane: 1700 ppm, TEEL. 3) Methyl Mercaptan: 23 ppm, AEGL (Do NOT accept ERPG or 25 ppm). 4) Sodium Hydroxide: 5 mg/m3, TEEL. 5) Acetone: 3200 ppm, AEGL (Do NOT accept TEEL).
